browser_only_method: This method is only supported in browser/Docker mode
desktop_only_method: This method is only supported in the desktop app
docker_native_picker_unsupported: Native file pickers are not supported in Docker mode. Use the upload flow instead.
docker_personalization_export_unsupporte: Personalization package export is not supported in Docker mode. Use the desktop app for this feature.
docker_personalization_import_unsupporte: Personalization package import is not supported in Docker mode. Use the desktop app for this feature.
docker_open_file_unsupported: Opening a local file directly from the browser is not supported in Docker mode
docker_open_folder_unsupported: Opening a local folder directly from the browser is not supported in Docker mode
